title: Xiaohongshu Open Sources BigMac: Freeing Multi-modal Training from the Trade-off Between Memory and Speed
excerpt: Multi-modal large language models are becoming the foundation of the next generation of AI, but their training systems have been stuck by an old problem for a l
content_html:
Multi-modal large language models are becoming the foundation of the next generation of AI, but their training systems have been stuck by an old problem for a long time—those that compute fast can't handle the memory; those that save memory are slow. The Dots Infra team at Xiaohongshu calls this dilemma the Pareto frontier of multi-modal pipeline training, and now they have torn a hole in this frontier. On July 22, the team officially open-sourced a new paradigm for pipeline parallel training called BigMac, specifically targeting native multi-modal scenarios. The open-source address is already hosted under GitHub's Dots-Infra.

Multi-modal models have never been a neat transformer. A typical MLLM consists of three parts: modal encoders that convert images and audio into embeddings, the LLM backbone that performs inference on them, and a generator that maps the LLM output back to target modalities like images and speech. These three parts vary greatly in form, and putting them into the same pipeline brings trouble.

The industry has usually taken two approaches: one is computationally efficient, taking the encoder and generator out of the LLM pipeline and running them separately. The benefit is that the fluctuation in the duration of modal modules does not create bubbles in the LLM pipeline, but the downside is that activation memory grows with the number of microbatches, which is especially expensive at scale. The other approach is memory-efficient, putting all modules into the same pipeline as front and back stages. This shortens the activation lifecycle and reduces memory usage, but if any encoder or generator is slow, the entire LLM pipeline must wait, leading to tail bubbles. When the scale increases, both designs reveal their bottlenecks.

BigMac's starting point is simple yet crucial: the mainline should still be the highly optimized LLM pipeline. Large-scale LLM training has long relied on mature schedules such as 1F1B or interleaved 1F1B, which are deeply integrated with production-level training stacks. BigMac does not replace them but treats the LLM schedule as the underlying timeline, inserting the computation of the encoder and generator into positions where the input is ready and the LLM execution order is not disturbed. The team calls this design a "quasi-dependency-safe nested pipeline."

This design brings two properties: first, the fluctuation in the duration of the encoder and generator no longer propagates along the LLM pipeline, and the LLM continues to proceed at its own pace. Second, the memory required for modal activations is reduced to O(1) at the algorithm level. The encoder no longer needs to retain activations for all microbatches until the end of the pipeline, and the generator doesn’t need to drag along a long activation tail. In other words, BigMac isn’t trading memory for bubbles, but rewriting the schedule structure so that these two goals no longer have to be mutually exclusive.

From being able to design a schedule to actually training it, there are a series of engineering challenges, including system integration, interface definition, and performance debugging. BigMac aims directly at these steps. It provides three things. First, it puts the global schedule in the open: the scheduler generates a global operator table covering all pipeline ranks, microbatches, and module types during runtime, and the executor then splits it into local sequences for each rank, distributing them to LLM backends like Megatron Core, modal runtimes, and communication backends. Scheduling strategies are now visible, checkable, and friendly to the backend.

Second, it offers a pipeline parallel interface that is invisible to algorithm engineers: engineers only need to describe what each module produces and consumes, and the rest—stage division, activation and gradient handoff, cross-device communication—is handled by BigMac under the hood, allowing a multi-modal experiment verified on a single card to expand more naturally to pipeline parallelism. Third, it offers a set of profiling, simulation, and visualization tools to understand the schedule structure, breaking down a training iteration to the operator level, showing exactly what each rank is doing at each time point, where it is idle, and which dependency is holding up the next step. The simulator can also test different PP configurations and microbatch combinations before investing heavily in training, estimating their impact on bubbles and throughput.

The effectiveness of BigMac has been validated on two representative workloads. In MLLM-Understanding, using Qwen3-30B-A3B as the backbone and a 1.3B ViT encoder, BigMac speeds up by 1.08 to 1.1 times compared to the computationally efficient baseline Optimus, and by 1.6 to 1.9 times compared to the memory-efficient baseline Megatron-DistTrain. More importantly, memory usage remains stable as the per-GPU batch size increases, while Optimus' peak memory surges and eventually causes OOM at larger batches. MLLM-Generation is more complex, adding a 20B MMDiT generator, and the difference becomes even more pronounced: Optimus fails on all tested batch sizes due to OOM, while BigMac avoids this by efficiently running the generator backward and quickly releasing the activation on the generator side. Compared to Megatron-DistTrain, it still achieves a 1.5 to 1.9 times speedup, with memory remaining stable. This is precisely the most valuable scenario for the nested pipeline—the system must serve both the encoder and generator dependencies without tolerating excessive activation retention or serious idling.

Currently, BigMac has become one of the core components of Dots’ multi-modal model training and is running in Xiaohongshu’s production environment. The related paper, "BigMac: Breaking the Pareto Frontier of Compute and Memory in Multimodal LLM Training," is already available on arXiv, and the team has also released interactive PP Profiler trace examples. For researchers and engineers currently caught between memory and speed constraints in multi-modal training, this open-source project with production validation may save a lot of time from re-inventing the wheel.

blocks.html_en: Multi-modal large language models are becoming the foundation of the next generation of AI, but their training systems have been stuck by an old problem for a long time—those that compute fast can't handle the memory; those that save memory are slow. The Dots Infra team at Xiaohongshu calls this dilemma the Pareto frontier of multi-modal pipeline training, and now they have torn a hole in this frontier. On July 22, the team officially open-sourced a new paradigm for pipeline parallel training called BigMac, specifically targeting native multi-modal scenarios. The open-source address is already hosted under GitHub's Dots-Infra.

sentences.en: Multi-modal large language models are becoming the foundation of the next generation of AI, but their training systems have been stuck by an old problem for a long time—those that compute fast can't handle the memory; those that save memory are slow.
sentences.zh: 多模态大语言模型正在成为下一代人工智能的基础，但其训练系统却长期被一个老问题困扰——计算快的无法处理内存；那些节省内存的速度很慢。

sentences.en: The Dots Infra team at Xiaohongshu calls this dilemma the Pareto frontier of multi-modal pipeline training, and now they have torn a hole in this frontier.
sentences.zh: 小红书的 Dots Infra 团队将这种困境称为多模态管道训练的帕累托前沿，现在他们已经在这个前沿上撕开了一个洞。

sentences.en: On July 22, the team officially open-sourced a new paradigm for pipeline parallel training called BigMac, specifically targeting native multi-modal scenarios.
sentences.zh: 7 月 22 日，该团队正式开源了一种名为 BigMac 的管道并行训练新范式，专门针对原生多模态场景。

sentences.en: The open-source address is already hosted under GitHub's Dots-Infra.
sentences.zh: 该开源地址已托管在 GitHub 的 Dots-Infra 下。

blocks.html_en: Multi-modal models have never been a neat transformer. A typical MLLM consists of three parts: modal encoders that convert images and audio into embeddings, the LLM backbone that performs inference on them, and a generator that maps the LLM output back to target modalities like images and speech. These three parts vary greatly in form, and putting them into the same pipeline brings trouble.

sentences.en: Multi-modal models have never been a neat transformer.
sentences.zh: 多模态模型从来都不是一个简洁的转换器。

sentences.en: A typical MLLM consists of three parts: modal encoders that convert images and audio into embeddings, the LLM backbone that performs inference on them, and a generator that maps the LLM output back to target modalities like images and speech.
sentences.zh: 典型的 MLLM 由三部分组成：将图像和音频转换为嵌入的模态编码器、对其进行推理的 LLM 主干，以及将 LLM 输出映射回图像和语音等目标模态的生成器。

sentences.en: These three parts vary greatly in form, and putting them into the same pipeline brings trouble.
sentences.zh: 这三个部分的形式差异很大，将它们放在同一个管道中会带来麻烦。

blocks.html_en: The industry has usually taken two approaches: one is computationally efficient, taking the encoder and generator out of the LLM pipeline and running them separately. The benefit is that the fluctuation in the duration of modal modules does not create bubbles in the LLM pipeline, but the downside is that activation memory grows with the number of microbatches, which is especially expensive at scale. The other approach is memory-efficient, putting all modules into the same pipeline as front and back stages. This shortens the activation lifecycle and reduces memory usage, but if any encoder or generator is slow, the entire LLM pipeline must wait, leading to tail bubbles. When the scale increases, both designs reveal their bottlenecks.

sentences.en: The industry has usually taken two approaches: one is computationally efficient, taking the encoder and generator out of the LLM pipeline and running them separately.
sentences.zh: 业界通常采取两种方法：一种是计算效率高，将编码器和生成器从 LLM 管道中取出并单独运行。

sentences.en: The benefit is that the fluctuation in the duration of modal modules does not create bubbles in the LLM pipeline, but the downside is that activation memory grows with the number of microbatches, which is especially expensive at scale.
sentences.zh: 好处是模态模块持续时间的波动不会在 LLM 管道中产生气泡，但缺点是激活内存随着微批次数量的增加而增长，这在规模化时尤其昂贵。

sentences.en: The other approach is memory-efficient, putting all modules into the same pipeline as front and back stages.
sentences.zh: 另一种方法是内存高效的，将所有模块放入与前级和后台相同的管道中。

sentences.en: This shortens the activation lifecycle and reduces memory usage, but if any encoder or generator is slow, the entire LLM pipeline must wait, leading to tail bubbles.
sentences.zh: 这缩短了激活生命周期并减少了内存使用量，但如果任何编码器或生成器速度缓慢，则整个 LLM 管道必须等待，从而导致尾部气泡。

sentences.en: When the scale increases, both designs reveal their bottlenecks.
sentences.zh: 当规模增加时，两种设计都会暴露出各自的瓶颈。

blocks.html_en: BigMac's starting point is simple yet crucial: the mainline should still be the highly optimized LLM pipeline. Large-scale LLM training has long relied on mature schedules such as 1F1B or interleaved 1F1B, which are deeply integrated with production-level training stacks. BigMac does not replace them but treats the LLM schedule as the underlying timeline, inserting the computation of the encoder and generator into positions where the input is ready and the LLM execution order is not disturbed. The team calls this design a "quasi-dependency-safe nested pipeline."

sentences.en: BigMac's starting point is simple yet crucial: the mainline should still be the highly optimized LLM pipeline.
sentences.zh: BigMac 的出发点简单但至关重要：主线仍然应该是高度优化的 LLM 流程。

sentences.en: Large-scale LLM training has long relied on mature schedules such as 1F1B or interleaved 1F1B, which are deeply integrated with production-level training stacks.
sentences.zh: 大规模的LLM培训长期以来依赖于1F1B或交错1F1B等成熟的计划，这些计划与生产级培训堆栈深度集成。

sentences.en: BigMac does not replace them but treats the LLM schedule as the underlying timeline, inserting the computation of the encoder and generator into positions where the input is ready and the LLM execution order is not disturbed.
sentences.zh: BigMac 并没有取代它们，而是将 LLM 调度视为底层时间线，将编码器和生成器的计算插入到输入准备好并且 LLM 执行顺序不被干扰的位置。

sentences.en: The team calls this design a "quasi-dependency-safe nested pipeline."
sentences.zh: 该团队将此设计称为“准依赖安全嵌套管道”。

blocks.html_en: This design brings two properties: first, the fluctuation in the duration of the encoder and generator no longer propagates along the LLM pipeline, and the LLM continues to proceed at its own pace. Second, the memory required for modal activations is reduced to O(1) at the algorithm level. The encoder no longer needs to retain activations for all microbatches until the end of the pipeline, and the generator doesn’t need to drag along a long activation tail. In other words, BigMac isn’t trading memory for bubbles, but rewriting the schedule structure so that these two goals no longer have to be mutually exclusive.

sentences.en: This design brings two properties: first, the fluctuation in the duration of the encoder and generator no longer propagates along the LLM pipeline, and the LLM continues to proceed at its own pace.
sentences.zh: 这种设计带来了两个特性：首先，编码器和生成器持续时间的波动不再沿着LLM管道传播，LLM继续按照自己的节奏进行。

sentences.en: Second, the memory required for modal activations is reduced to O(1) at the algorithm level.
sentences.zh: 其次，模态激活所需的内存在算法级别减少到 O(1)。

sentences.en: The encoder no longer needs to retain activations for all microbatches until the end of the pipeline, and the generator doesn’t need to drag along a long activation tail.
sentences.zh: 编码器不再需要保留所有微批次的激活直到管道结束，并且生成器不需要沿着长激活尾部拖动。

sentences.en: In other words, BigMac isn’t trading memory for bubbles, but rewriting the schedule structure so that these two goals no longer have to be mutually exclusive.
sentences.zh: 换句话说，巨无霸并不是用内存换取泡沫，而是重写了时间表结构，使这两个目标不再相互排斥。

blocks.html_en: From being able to design a schedule to actually training it, there are a series of engineering challenges, including system integration, interface definition, and performance debugging. BigMac aims directly at these steps. It provides three things. First, it puts the global schedule in the open: the scheduler generates a global operator table covering all pipeline ranks, microbatches, and module types during runtime, and the executor then splits it into local sequences for each rank, distributing them to LLM backends like Megatron Core, modal runtimes, and communication backends. Scheduling strategies are now visible, checkable, and friendly to the backend.

sentences.en: From being able to design a schedule to actually training it, there are a series of engineering challenges, including system integration, interface definition, and performance debugging.
sentences.zh: 从能够设计时间表到实际训练它，存在一系列工程挑战，包括系统集成、接口定义和性能调试。

sentences.en: BigMac aims directly at these steps.
sentences.zh: BigMac 直接瞄准了这些步骤。

sentences.en: It provides three things.
sentences.zh: 它提供了三件事。

sentences.en: First, it puts the global schedule in the open: the scheduler generates a global operator table covering all pipeline ranks, microbatches, and module types during runtime, and the executor then splits it into local sequences for each rank, distributing them to LLM backends like Megatron Core, modal runtimes, and communication backends.
sentences.zh: 首先，它将全局调度公开：调度程序在运行时生成一个涵盖所有管道等级、微批次和模块类型的全局运算符表，然后执行器将其拆分为每个等级的本地序列，并将它们分发到 LLM 后端（如威震天核心）、模态运行时和通信后端。

sentences.en: Scheduling strategies are now visible, checkable, and friendly to the backend.
sentences.zh: 调度策略现在对后端可见、可检查且友好。

blocks.html_en: Second, it offers a pipeline parallel interface that is invisible to algorithm engineers: engineers only need to describe what each module produces and consumes, and the rest—stage division, activation and gradient handoff, cross-device communication—is handled by BigMac under the hood, allowing a multi-modal experiment verified on a single card to expand more naturally to pipeline parallelism. Third, it offers a set of profiling, simulation, and visualization tools to understand the schedule structure, breaking down a training iteration to the operator level, showing exactly what each rank is doing at each time point, where it is idle, and which dependency is holding up the next step. The simulator can also test different PP configurations and microbatch combinations before investing heavily in training, estimating their impact on bubbles and throughput.

sentences.en: Second, it offers a pipeline parallel interface that is invisible to algorithm engineers: engineers only need to describe what each module produces and consumes, and the rest—stage division, activation and gradient handoff, cross-device communication—is handled by BigMac under the hood, allowing a multi-modal experiment verified on a single card to expand more naturally to pipeline parallelism.
sentences.zh: 其次，它提供了算法工程师看不见的管道并行接口：工程师只需要描述每个模块生产和消耗什么，其余的阶段划分、激活和梯度切换、跨设备通信都由 BigMac 在幕后处理，允许在单卡上验证的多模态实验更自然地扩展到管道并行。

sentences.en: Third, it offers a set of profiling, simulation, and visualization tools to understand the schedule structure, breaking down a training iteration to the operator level, showing exactly what each rank is doing at each time point, where it is idle, and which dependency is holding up the next step.
sentences.zh: 第三，它提供了一组分析、模拟和可视化工具来了解调度结构，将训练迭代分解到操作员级别，准确显示每个等级在每个时间点正在做什么、空闲的位置以及哪个依赖项阻碍了下一步。

sentences.en: The simulator can also test different PP configurations and microbatch combinations before investing heavily in training, estimating their impact on bubbles and throughput.
sentences.zh: 该模拟器还可以在投入大量培训之前测试不同的 PP 配置和微批次组合，估计它们对气泡和吞吐量的影响。

blocks.html_en: The effectiveness of BigMac has been validated on two representative workloads. In MLLM-Understanding, using Qwen3-30B-A3B as the backbone and a 1.3B ViT encoder, BigMac speeds up by 1.08 to 1.1 times compared to the computationally efficient baseline Optimus, and by 1.6 to 1.9 times compared to the memory-efficient baseline Megatron-DistTrain. More importantly, memory usage remains stable as the per-GPU batch size increases, while Optimus' peak memory surges and eventually causes OOM at larger batches. MLLM-Generation is more complex, adding a 20B MMDiT generator, and the difference becomes even more pronounced: Optimus fails on all tested batch sizes due to OOM, while BigMac avoids this by efficiently running the generator backward and quickly releasing the activation on the generator side. Compared to Megatron-DistTrain, it still achieves a 1.5 to 1.9 times speedup, with memory remaining stable. This is precisely the most valuable scenario for the nested pipeline—the system must serve both the encoder and generator dependencies without tolerating excessive activation retention or serious idling.

sentences.en: The effectiveness of BigMac has been validated on two representative workloads.
sentences.zh: BigMac 的有效性已在两个代表性工作负载上得到验证。

sentences.en: In MLLM-Understanding, using Qwen3-30B-A3B as the backbone and a 1.3B ViT encoder, BigMac speeds up by 1.08 to 1.1 times compared to the computationally efficient baseline Optimus, and by 1.6 to 1.9 times compared to the memory-efficient baseline Megatron-DistTrain.
sentences.zh: 在 MLLM-Understanding 中，使用 Qwen3-30B-A3B 作为主干和 1.3B ViT 编码器，与计算高效的基线 Optimus 相比，BigMac 的速度提高了 1.08 至 1.1 倍，与内存高效的基线 Megatron-DistTrain 相比，速度提高了 1.6 至 1.9 倍。

sentences.en: More importantly, memory usage remains stable as the per-GPU batch size increases, while Optimus' peak memory surges and eventually causes OOM at larger batches.
sentences.zh: 更重要的是，随着每个 GPU 批次大小的增加，内存使用量保持稳定，而 Optimus 的峰值内存会激增，并最终在较大批次时导致 OOM。

sentences.en: MLLM-Generation is more complex, adding a 20B MMDiT generator, and the difference becomes even more pronounced: Optimus fails on all tested batch sizes due to OOM, while BigMac avoids this by efficiently running the generator backward and quickly releasing the activation on the generator side.
sentences.zh: MLLM-Generation 更加复杂，添加了 20B MMDiT 生成器，差异变得更加明显：由于 OOM，Optimus 在所有测试的批量大小上都失败了，而 BigMac 通过高效地向后运行生成器并快速释放生成器端的激活来避免这种情况。

sentences.en: Compared to Megatron-DistTrain, it still achieves a 1.5 to 1.9 times speedup, with memory remaining stable.
sentences.zh: 与 Megatron-DistTrain 相比，它仍然实现了 1.5 至 1.9 倍的加速，并且内存保持稳定。

sentences.en: This is precisely the most valuable scenario for the nested pipeline—the system must serve both the encoder and generator dependencies without tolerating excessive activation retention or serious idling.
sentences.zh: 这正是嵌套管道最有价值的场景——系统必须同时满足编码器和生成器的依赖关系，而不能容忍过多的激活保留或严重的空闲。

blocks.html_en: Currently, BigMac has become one of the core components of Dots’ multi-modal model training and is running in Xiaohongshu’s production environment. The related paper, "BigMac: Breaking the Pareto Frontier of Compute and Memory in Multimodal LLM Training," is already available on arXiv, and the team has also released interactive PP Profiler trace examples. For researchers and engineers currently caught between memory and speed constraints in multi-modal training, this open-source project with production validation may save a lot of time from re-inventing the wheel.

sentences.en: Currently, BigMac has become one of the core components of Dots’ multi-modal model training and is running in Xiaohongshu’s production environment.
sentences.zh: 目前，BigMac已成为Dots多模态模型训练的核心组件之一，并运行在小红书的生产环境中。

sentences.en: The related paper, "BigMac: Breaking the Pareto Frontier of Compute and Memory in Multimodal LLM Training," is already available on arXiv, and the team has also released interactive PP Profiler trace examples.
sentences.zh: 相关论文《BigMac：打破多模式 LLM 训练中计算和内存的帕累托前沿》已在 arXiv 上发布，该团队还发布了交互式 PP Profiler 跟踪示例。

sentences.en: For researchers and engineers currently caught between memory and speed constraints in multi-modal training, this open-source project with production validation may save a lot of time from re-inventing the wheel.
sentences.zh: 对于目前在多模式训练中陷入内存和速度限制的研究人员和工程师来说，这个具有生产验证的开源项目可能会节省大量重新发明轮子的时间。

content_html_zh:
多模态大语言模型正在成为下一代人工智能的基础，但其训练系统却长期被一个老问题困扰——计算快的无法处理内存；那些节省内存的速度很慢。 小红书的 Dots Infra 团队将这种困境称为多模态管道训练的帕累托前沿，现在他们已经在这个前沿上撕开了一个洞。 7 月 22 日，该团队正式开源了一种名为 BigMac 的管道并行训练新范式，专门针对原生多模态场景。 该开源地址已托管在 GitHub 的 Dots-Infra 下。

多模态模型从来都不是一个简洁的转换器。 典型的 MLLM 由三部分组成：将图像和音频转换为嵌入的模态编码器、对其进行推理的 LLM 主干，以及将 LLM 输出映射回图像和语音等目标模态的生成器。 这三个部分的形式差异很大，将它们放在同一个管道中会带来麻烦。

业界通常采取两种方法：一种是计算效率高，将编码器和生成器从 LLM 管道中取出并单独运行。 好处是模态模块持续时间的波动不会在 LLM 管道中产生气泡，但缺点是激活内存随着微批次数量的增加而增长，这在规模化时尤其昂贵。 另一种方法是内存高效的，将所有模块放入与前级和后台相同的管道中。 这缩短了激活生命周期并减少了内存使用量，但如果任何编码器或生成器速度缓慢，则整个 LLM 管道必须等待，从而导致尾部气泡。 当规模增加时，两种设计都会暴露出各自的瓶颈。

BigMac 的出发点简单但至关重要：主线仍然应该是高度优化的 LLM 流程。 大规模的LLM培训长期以来依赖于1F1B或交错1F1B等成熟的计划，这些计划与生产级培训堆栈深度集成。 BigMac 并没有取代它们，而是将 LLM 调度视为底层时间线，将编码器和生成器的计算插入到输入准备好并且 LLM 执行顺序不被干扰的位置。 该团队将此设计称为“准依赖安全嵌套管道”。

这种设计带来了两个特性：首先，编码器和生成器持续时间的波动不再沿着LLM管道传播，LLM继续按照自己的节奏进行。 其次，模态激活所需的内存在算法级别减少到 O(1)。 编码器不再需要保留所有微批次的激活直到管道结束，并且生成器不需要沿着长激活尾部拖动。 换句话说，巨无霸并不是用内存换取泡沫，而是重写了时间表结构，使这两个目标不再相互排斥。

从能够设计时间表到实际训练它，存在一系列工程挑战，包括系统集成、接口定义和性能调试。 BigMac 直接瞄准了这些步骤。 它提供了三件事。 首先，它将全局调度公开：调度程序在运行时生成一个涵盖所有管道等级、微批次和模块类型的全局运算符表，然后执行器将其拆分为每个等级的本地序列，并将它们分发到 LLM 后端（如威震天核心）、模态运行时和通信后端。 调度策略现在对后端可见、可检查且友好。

其次，它提供了算法工程师看不见的管道并行接口：工程师只需要描述每个模块生产和消耗什么，其余的阶段划分、激活和梯度切换、跨设备通信都由 BigMac 在幕后处理，允许在单卡上验证的多模态实验更自然地扩展到管道并行。 第三，它提供了一组分析、模拟和可视化工具来了解调度结构，将训练迭代分解到操作员级别，准确显示每个等级在每个时间点正在做什么、空闲的位置以及哪个依赖项阻碍了下一步。 该模拟器还可以在投入大量培训之前测试不同的 PP 配置和微批次组合，估计它们对气泡和吞吐量的影响。

BigMac 的有效性已在两个代表性工作负载上得到验证。 在 MLLM-Understanding 中，使用 Qwen3-30B-A3B 作为主干和 1.3B ViT 编码器，与计算高效的基线 Optimus 相比，BigMac 的速度提高了 1.08 至 1.1 倍，与内存高效的基线 Megatron-DistTrain 相比，速度提高了 1.6 至 1.9 倍。 更重要的是，随着每个 GPU 批次大小的增加，内存使用量保持稳定，而 Optimus 的峰值内存会激增，并最终在较大批次时导致 OOM。 MLLM-Generation 更加复杂，添加了 20B MMDiT 生成器，差异变得更加明显：由于 OOM，Optimus 在所有测试的批量大小上都失败了，而 BigMac 通过高效地向后运行生成器并快速释放生成器端的激活来避免这种情况。 与 Megatron-DistTrain 相比，它仍然实现了 1.5 至 1.9 倍的加速，并且内存保持稳定。 这正是嵌套管道最有价值的场景——系统必须同时满足编码器和生成器的依赖关系，而不能容忍过多的激活保留或严重的空闲。

目前，BigMac已成为Dots多模态模型训练的核心组件之一，并运行在小红书的生产环境中。 相关论文《BigMac：打破多模式 LLM 训练中计算和内存的帕累托前沿》已在 arXiv 上发布，该团队还发布了交互式 PP Profiler 跟踪示例。 对于目前在多模式训练中陷入内存和速度限制的研究人员和工程师来说，这个具有生产验证的开源项目可能会节省大量重新发明轮子的时间。
